# Five Below — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Five Below is a popular value-focused retail chain known for offering a wide variety of fun, trendy, and affordable products — primarily toys, games, and lifestyle items priced at $5, $10, and $25. A new location is coming soon to Glenwood Plaza in Oneida, New York, bringing the brand's signature high-energy, budget-friendly shopping experience to the local community.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Discover the hottest toys, games, and lifestyle gear priced at just $5, $10, and $25! Find a Five Below near you or shop the newest budget-friendly trends now.

### Thank You - Submission Received
https://example.com/thank-you
Thank you for contacting our driveline retail merchandising team. Your message has been successfully received.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- Address: 2094 Glenwood Shopping Plaza, Oneida, NY 13421, Oneida , New York, 13421, USA

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (text)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Five Below
Five Below is a popular value-focused retail chain known for offering a wide variety of fun, trendy, and affordable products — primarily toys, games, and lifestyle items priced at $5, $10, and $25. A new location is coming soon to Glenwood Plaza in Oneida, New York, bringing the brand's signature high-energy, budget-friendly shopping experience to the local community.

## Target Audience
- shoppers looking for affordable products, families, teens, and budget-conscious consumers
- Budget-Conscious Families
- Teen Trendsetters
- College Students on a Budget

## Industry
Retail

---

# Machine-readable feeds

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
